findings.description: The fully qualified class name `nablarch.fw.handler.RewriteRule` is missing from s4 hints. The source explicitly references this superclass as `nablarch.fw.handler.RewriteRule`, and its Javadoc URL is included in `official_doc_urls`, but only the simple name `RewriteRule` appears in the hints.
findings.source_evidence: スーパークラスの :java:extdoc:`RewriteRule <nablarch.fw.handler.RewriteRule>` に定義されている
